title: KBOPL Regulation for Service Amendment, 2003
text: KBOPL Service (Amendment) Regulations, 2003 NOTIFICATION Published in Gazette of India, (Extraordinary) Part-III, Section 4 Pages (1-4), Dated 05-05-2003 Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library, Patna Patna, the 30th January, 2003 No.KBLIB-Regulations-01/2003 – In exercise of powers vested by section 12 read with clause (e) of Sub- section (2) of Section 28 of the Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Act, 1969 (43 of 1969), the Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Board, with the approval of the Central Government, hereby makes the following regulations : 1. Short title and Commencement (1)These regulation will be called the Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Service (Amendment) Regulations, 2003. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Service Regulations, 1986 - 81.No.1 of Schedule 1 of Regulation 6 (i), specifying in the method of recruitment to the post, classification, scale of pay, age-limit, qualifications and other matters connected with the post of DIRECTOR, shall be substituted by the Schedule annexed herewith. DR. MOHD. ZIAUDDIN ANSARI, Secy. [No. ADVT. III/ IV/ 330A/03 Exty.] Note: The principal Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Service Regulations were notified in the Gazette of India. Part-III. Section - 4. dated 07-06-1986 at pages 1043-1063 (Schedule I) -- 1 of 2 -- C:\Users\KHUDA BAKSH\Documents\Recruitment Rule for Director Schedule - 1 (Regulation 6) - as per 7 CPC.doc Schedule – I (See Regulation 6) 1. Name of the post DIRECTOR 3. Number of post 1 3. Classification Group A 4. Pay Band & Grade Pay ` 1,44,200 – ` 2,18,200/- 5. Whether Selection post or non- selection Not applicable. 6. Whether benefit of added years of service admissible under rule 30 of the CCS (Pension) Rules, 1972 No. 7. Age limit for direct recruitment Between 40-52 years. 8. Education and other qualifications required for direct recruitment (a) A renowned scholar in Arabic/ Persian/ Urdu/ Islamic Studies/ Medieval Indian History. (b) Degree of Ph.D. in any of the above subjects / fields. (c) A good knowledge of Urdu/Persian/ Arabic languages. (d) At least 15 years’ experience of teaching/ research/administration in a comparable Library, University or other teaching institution. 9. Whether age and educational qualification prescribed for direct recruitment will apply in the case of promotion : Not applicable 10. Period of probation/deputation, if any 2 Years 11. Method of recruitment whether by direct recruitment or by promotion or by deputation / transfer and percentage of the vacancies to be filled by various methods. By Deputation / Direct recruitment (including short term contract) 12. In case of recruitment by Promotion/Deputation/Transfer, Grades from which promotion or deputation or transfer to be made Not applicable. 13. If a DPC/Selection Committee Exists, what is its composition : (1) Chairman of the Library Board or in his absence his nominee; (2) A nominee of the Government of India; (3) A nominee of the Government of Bihar; (4) A member nominated by the Board from amongst themselves; (5) An expert on the subject nominated by the Board; (6) Director of the Library. 14. Circumstances in which UPSC to be consulted for making recruitment Not applicable. -- 2 of 2 --
